name: fresh-data
description: Force live data sourcing. Never cite training-era facts without a live lookup.

interface.longDescription: Never cite prices, versions, benchmarks, or any time-sensitive fact from training data without a live lookup. Use WebSearch or WebFetch against an authoritative source. State the URL and that it was retrieved today.
defaultPrompt: Use Fresh Data mode for this task.
Look up the current price/version/state before citing any fact.
